targetArea: VCPChat Codex Router visible summary and monitor evidence

diagnosis.historyRecorded: A:/VCP/VCPChat_native_host/AppData/UserData/_Agent_1777109724527_1777109724527/topics/default/history.json contained the visible Codex Router summary for the task id.
diagnosis.cause: The renderer summary read only shallow fields. Actual codex-router run results are shaped as { decisionResult, executionResult }, with policy/model/tool fields nested under decisionResult.decision and executionResult.
diagnosis.oldRunLimit: The previous raw result was only kept in the live renderer window and was not persisted to disk, so that existing history entry cannot be enriched from disk.

renderer.change: Visible summary now extracts fields from decisionResult, executionResult, decisionResult.decision.execution, decisionResult.executionPlan, and executionResult.steps.
renderer.visibleEvidencePath: When IPC returns a run evidence file path, the chat summary includes a monitor evidence line.

mainProcess.change: CodexRouterHost run/resume now writes sanitized JSON evidence under AppData/codexRouter/runs and returns the evidence reference to renderer.
safety: Does not store raw primitive output.
Stores governance metadata and primitive statuses only.

notValidated: A new live routed task has not yet been sent after this fix.
Next expected validation is a new Codex Router task producing both enriched visible chat summary and a JSON evidence file under AppData/codexRouter/runs.
